data.title: Talent agency formerly known as Wasserman and now named The Team is attracting buyers after founder's emails appeared in Epstein documents.
data.description: The agency formerly known as Wasserman, now rebranded as The Team, is up for sale following the discovery of its founder's emails in the Epstein files.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Warns Iran As Strait Of Hormuz Blockade Begins; Broadcom, Bloom, Sandisk Are Big Winners
data.description: In recent updates on the market, Dow Jones Futures experienced a surge following President Trump's caution to Iran regarding the U.S. blockade at the vital Strait of Hormuz. Sandisk notably reached record-breaking heights amidst this news. Noteworthy winners alongside Sandisk in this development included Broadcom and Bloom. This development marks an important shift in the market landscape.

data.title: Bessent Defends Trump's Iran War Move Saying US Economy Was In 'Good Shape'— But Warns Growth May Be Slower This Quarter
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent recently suggested that the economic growth for the current quarter may be slower due to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Speaking with CNBC's Sara Eisen, Bessent highlighted the strong economy prior to the conflict and mentioned that President Donald Trump's decision to go to war was influenced by positive economic indicators. Bessent relied on "micro data points" from companies and banks to analyze the economy instead of making precise GDP forecasts. He referenced JP Morgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon's remarks on consumer credit and noted corporate earnings as signals that both consumers and businesses are still resilient. Bessent mentioned that predicting GDP would depend on the length of the conflict, which is currently uncertain. He mentioned, "I don't know whether it's three days or three weeks."
Gavin Newsom Rips Trump Over 'Energy Dominance' Claims Amid Spiking Fuel Prices— 'Completely Detached Failure'

data.title: In HelloNation, Mr. Phase Converter Jay Yuergens of New Berlin, WI, Breaks Down Phase Converter Sizing
data.description: A recent article by HelloNation explores the topic of determining the appropriate size rotary phase converter for equipment, with insights from Jay Yuergens of North America Phase Converter Co. in New Berlin, Wisconsin. The article provides guidance on selecting the right converter based on equipment requirements. Located in New Berlin, Wisconsin, North America Phase Converter Co. offers expertise in this area and is led by Yuergens. For businesses seeking advice on the correct size rotary phase converter for their equipment, this article serves as a valuable resource.

data.title: Luraco Technologies Receives Prestigious Recognition from the White House, State of Texas, and City of Arlington
data.description: Luraco Technologies, a renowned provider of American-made medical massage and wellness products based in Texas, recently received prestigious accolades from key government officials. The President of the United States, the Governor of Texas, and the Mayor of Arlington honored the company for its outstanding contributions. This recognition signifies the company's commitment to excellence in the industry.

data.title: Controversy surrounds Palantir amid CEO Alex Karp's futuristic book, sparking a debate on AI-driven military strategy.
data.description: Recent discussions have been sparked after a weekend post highlighted concepts from CEO Alex Karp’s book set for release in 2025. The book has reignited a debate on Silicon Valley’s involvement in warfare and national defense. This has led to increased scrutiny and conversations surrounding the intersection of technology, corporate entities, and military operations. The post has generated significant interest, with a high number of engagements and shares on various online platforms. It has prompted individuals to reconsider the impact of tech companies on defense strategies and the ethical implications of such collaborations. The CEO’s ideas have brought attention to the evolving landscape of national security and the potential ramifications of increased private sector participation in military endeavors. Overall, the resurgence of this debate signifies a growing awareness of the complex relationship between the tech industry and matters of defense among the public and experts alike.

data.title: Kurita Invests in Cyclopure to Accelerate PFAS Business Expansion Utilizing DEXSORB in the United States
data.description: In Minneapolis, Kurita has made a significant investment in Cyclopure to enhance the distribution of advanced PFAS water treatment solutions throughout the United States. This move aims to address the growing concern over PFAS contamination in water sources. Kurita's investment signifies a commitment to expanding innovative water treatment technologies.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Specialist Kim Riha Shares Insights on Recreational Vehicle Insurance
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on April 20, 2026, Kim Riha from Accredited Insurance Group discusses the insurance necessary for off-road vehicles such as ATVs, UTVs, and travel trailers which may not be adequately covered by standard auto or homeowners policies. It is important to assess the unique insurance requirements for these vehicles to ensure comprehensive coverage.

data.title: Virginia American Water Celebrates Earth Day with Environmental Initiatives & Water Saving Tips
data.description: Ways to Celebrate Earth Day Every Day in Alexandria, VA - On April 20, 2026, Virginia American Water emphasized the significance of safeguarding local water resources as part of Earth Day. They stressed the need for environmental stewardship and strategic investments in infrastructure to ensure a sustainable future.

data.title: PurposeCare Expands Ohio Home Care Footprint with New Springfield Location
data.description: PurposeCare, a prominent home-based care organization operating across multiple states, recently expanded its operations in southwestern Ohio with the inauguration of a new office in Springfield. The ribbon-cutting ceremony on April 9 marked the official opening of the new location. This development is part of the company's efforts to enhance its services in the region and cater to the increasing demand for home-based care. The new office is expected to create numerous job opportunities and further strengthen PurposeCare's presence in the area.

data.title: Perficient Demonstrates How Healthcare and B2B Organizations Move from AI Experimentation to Enterprise-Scale Execution
data.description: A showcase of advanced AI solutions designed for healthcare patient engagement and B2B commerce will be presented by Perficient at the Adobe Summit 2026 event in St. Louis and New York. This demonstration will highlight the latest innovative technologies that are ready for deployment, emphasizing practical applications in these critical sectors.
